steps.t: The supplies are at Echad Sirion, on the eastern banks of the Anduin. Agorin has tasked you with finding clean bandages that have been misplaced among…
The wounded Elves are at Echad Sirion, on the eastern banks of the Anduin. Now that you have collected enough bandages, you should see to the treatmen…
Agorin is at Echad Sirion, on the eastern banks of the Anduin
